exemplar.title: How does Dolly Alderton convey the importance of female friendships in her autobiography Everything I Know About Love?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does Dolly Alderton convey the importance of female friendships in her autobiography Everything I Know About Love?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Clear and consistent focus throughout the essay, with research question prominently stated and threaded into each section
Effective topic communication and logical section headings that maintain coherence
weaknesses: Methodology description lacks depthâno rationale for source selection or discussion of alternatives
Reliance on popular rather than scholarly sources and uneven citation practice
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two of the three strands (topic clarity and RQ focus) sit solidly in the 5â6 band, but the methodology strand is only at the 3â4 level. An overall band-3/4 rating (4/6) fairly balances high focus with a serviceable but under-developed methodological approach.

strengths: Good and coherent understanding of Aldertonâs narrative with effective use of feminist theory
Mostly accurate and purposeful deployment of subject-specific terminology (juxtaposition, rhetorical question, characterisation)
weaknesses: Inconsistent bibliographic detail (missing page numbers, uncited statistics) undermines rigor
Occasional typographical slips and uneven source integration impede full academic precision
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Knowledge and understanding of the text and concepts is solid (band 3â4), but gaps in citation practice and sporadic inaccuracies prevent elevation to the top band. A mid-band score of 4/6 reflects this balance.

strengths: Analysis reliably links textual evidence to claims about friendship themes
Argument remains coherent with several insightful critical observations (e.g., socioeconomic privilege, reader alienation)
weaknesses: Depth of analysis is unevenâoccasional descriptive passages and unsupported generalisations
Critical evaluation is intermittent with limited counter-argument development
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Research relevance and analytical quality consistently meet the 4â6 band descriptors. Though competent, the discussion lacks the systematic critical rigour of higher bands, meriting a 4/12 final.

strengths: All required structural elements are present (title page, TOC, headings, bibliography)
Logical organization aids navigation and readability
weaknesses: Page numbering is not visible and some paragraphs break mid-sentence
Formatting inconsistencies (broken URLs, informal phrasing) detract from professional presentation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the essay broadly adheres to IB presentation conventions, notable layout and formatting errors place it in the 1â2 band. A score of 2/4 appropriately reflects mostly adequate structure undermined by visible lapses.

strandSelections.reasoning: Methodology is serviceable rather than robust.  The primary text is read closely and a handful of secondary sources (â 6) are cited, yet several are popular reviews or blog posts rather than scholarly works, and citation style is uneven.  There is no explicit explanation of how sources were selected nor a discussion of alternative approaches, so evidence of informed, effective selection is limited.  This satisfies a âmostly completeâ methodology with âgenerally relevantâ sources, meriting the lower end of the 3â4 band.

Layout adheres to most IB guidelines: word count, title, section headings, and a bibliography are provided.  Citations attempt an APA style but are inconsistently formatted and URLs occasionally break across lines; page numbering is implied in the table of contents but not visibly shown in the extract.  Since most but not all formatting conventions are correctly applied, the strand meets the 3-4 band but merits 3 rather than 4.

Research is adequate: primary evidence is plentiful and each section is reinforced with at least one secondary citation, yet the academic rigour of several sources is questionable (online magazines, ONS press summaries).  Relevance to the RQ is usually clear, but breadth and scholarly depth are limited, so the work comfortably meetsânot exceedsâthe 4-6 bandâs lower margin.

The studentâs topic â the importance of female friendships in Aldertonâs memoir â is announced explicitly in the title, reiterated in the introduction, and remains the clear organising thread for every section (emotional support, identity, platonic over romantic).  Each heading, paragraph and textual example consistently links back to this focus, demonstrating purposeful control.  Minor digressions (e.g., demographic statistics about Gen Z) do not obscure the overall clarity, so the work meets the descriptor of being communicated âaccurately and effectively,â though occasional verbosity prevents it from being exemplary enough for the very top of the band.

The discussion maintains a coherent line of argument that Alderton privileges female friendship, and the student occasionally evaluates limitations (e.g., Aldertonâs socioeconomic privilege).  Yet critical evaluation is intermittent and usually brief, and counter-arguments are not systematically developed.  Consequently, argumentation is âgoodâ rather than âexcellent,â supporting a mid-band score of 4.

Analytical passages connect quotations to claims and often explain how narrative choices foreground friendship (e.g., dedication page, contrasting lists).  However, commentary can become descriptive and sometimes reiterates plot or social context without probing stylistic nuance.  Conclusions are generally supported but not always deeply layered, so the work sits at a competent but not highly sophisticated levelâappropriate for a 4 within the 4-6 band.

The essay follows the required EE structure: title page with word count, table of contents, introduction, clearly headed sections, conclusion, and bibliography.  Transitions are generally logical, though paragraphing can be uneven and some sections verge on repetition.  All core structural elements are present, warranting placement in the appropriate structure band, but minor organisational weaknesses justify the lower half of that band.

The essay demonstrates clear knowledge of Aldertonâs narrative: it quotes specific passages, traces structural devices (lists, dedication), and references feminist theory.  Understanding is coherent, but use of secondary material is patchyâsome statistics are dropped in without full bibliographic detail and critical voices are limited.  Overall knowledge is âgoodâ rather than âexcellent,â aligning with the upper end of the 3â4 band.

Subject terminology such as âjuxtaposition,â âcharacterisation,â ârhetorical question,â and âfoilâ is mostly accurate and applied appropriately to Aldertonâs text.  Occasional slips (âjuxtapositioningâ) and broad sociological vocabulary that drifts beyond literary analysis prevent absolute consistency, but overall usage is correct and purposeful, fulfilling the âmostly accurateâ criterion of the 3â4 band.

The research question is stated verbatim at the outset and is tightly focused on Aldertonâs stylistic choices in conveying female friendship.  The ensuing analysis (anecdote, irony, juxtaposition) remains well-aligned with that question, showing effective connection between question and discussion.  Because the scope (one contemporary memoir) is suitably narrow and manageable, the question is fully appropriate.  Minor drift into socio-economic commentary is present but does not materially weaken the alignment, justifying placement toward the middle of the highest band.

annotations.comment: The research question is prominently stated in the section header, providing clear focus and direction for the essayâs argument.
The word count is clearly provided on the title page, meeting the formatting requirement for EE submissions.
Table of contents is complete and logically ordered, aiding navigation through the essayâs structure.
Consider ensuring page numbers are visible in the header/footer to reinforce the table of contentsâ accuracy.
The introduction contextualizes the memoir well, but the research question could be linked here more explicitly at the start of the first paragraph.
The claim that literature should reshape social norms requires supporting evidence or a scholarly source to strengthen the argument.
The discussion of dedication pages is descriptive; consider condensing this overview to focus more on Aldertonâs specific stylistic choices.
Typo noted: âAlderonâ should be âAlderton,â which affects credibility and clarity of referencing the author.
Direct quotation from Kim (2021) lacks specific page number; include precise pagination for academic rigor.
The statistic on eating disorders is presented without methodological context; cite the studyâs sample or methodology to validate the figure.
The anecdotal account is descriptive; deepen the analysis by linking this story to narrative technique and reader response.
The critique of potential reader alienation demonstrates critical evaluation of narrative universality.
Generalizations about womenâs emotional suppression are insightful but need specific textual citations from Alderton to ground the claim.
Integration of Audre Lorde and contemporary feminist scholarship enriches the critical context effectively.
Section header clearly marks a new focus on identity, maintaining strong organizational coherence.
Quotation of Aldertonâs list lacks a page reference; include page numbers for all direct citations.
Analysis of the juxtaposition between early and late lists is well-developed, showing clear understanding of rhetorical function.
The last paragraph breaks mid-sentence; ensure complete paragraphs and avoid formatting discontinuities.
The analysis of lists as mirrors for reader reflection is insightful and deepens understanding of structure.
Contextual linkage to societal trends is effective, though the citation to âKim (2021)â should also appear in the bibliography.
The final sentence of this paragraph is incomplete; revise to maintain academic flow and coherence.
Reflection on oversimplifying growth is perceptive; consider connecting this reflection back to the research question.
Section header clearly signals the focus on platonic relationships, upholding organizational clarity.
Thematic summary lacks supporting quotes; incorporate specific passages to substantiate your claims.
Citation âONS Data, 2022â is not listed in the bibliography; ensure every source is fully referenced.
Characterization of Farly is richly detailed and highlights Aldertonâs stylistic precision.
Analysis of the rhetorical question effectively unpacks Aldertonâs admiration and narrative intent.
Conclusion succinctly reiterates key arguments but should acknowledge methodological limitations.
Historical context of feminist movements is described without citation; add a scholarly source to support this overview.
The reflection on realistic portrayal of friendship is balanced and shows critical engagement.
Discussion of socioeconomic privilege is a strong critical insight that deepens the evaluation.
Final sentence uses informal phrasing âall in allâ; revise to maintain an academic tone.
Bibliography entry for Alderton uses inconsistent punctuation; standardize formatting and include DOI or publisher location if available.
List-style references exhibit inconsistent citation formatting and broken URLs; review APA guidelines for consistency.
An OCR artifact (<math> tag) appears in a URL; correct the reference to ensure the link functions properly.
